name: Halloween: Black Cat Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together peanut butter, eggs, and water until smooth.
2. Gradually add the chocolate cake mix to the mixture. Stir until well combined.
3. Form the dough into 1-inch balls.
4. Place the dough balls on an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Flatten each ball with the bottom of a glass dipped in sugar.
6. Pinch out two ears at the top of each flattened cookie.
7. Add M&Ms (eyes) and red hots (nose).
8. Use a fork to press into the dough, forming whiskers.
9. Bake at 375°F for 8-10 minutes.
Makes 4 1/2 dozen cookies.
